name: gov_complaint
description: Citizen complaint intake, triage, response drafting, human approval, and publication.

sample_input.complaint: The streetlight on Soi 5 has been broken for two weeks and the area is unsafe at night.

docs:
Government complaint handling.

Flow: a complaint arrives (the `Citizen complaint intake` trigger fires a run with the complaint as input) -> `triage` classifies it -> `draft` writes an official response -> a human gate `review` approves or rejects -> on approve, `publish` releases the response to the citizen. Choosing `reject` at the gate ends the run without publishing, leaving the draft for revision. Roles: `operator` runs and decides the gate; `auditor` reviews the audit trail.

workflows.name: Citizen complaint handling
workflows.description: Triage a citizen complaint, draft a response, gate it on human approval, then publish.

nodes.label: Approve the drafted response before it is published

nodes.prompt:
Publish the approved response to the citizen via {input.channel}.
Response: {artifact.draft_response}
